description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a rich, dark wood grain finish and a minimalist design. The desk features a set of three drawers on the left side, each with a metallic handle, and an open shelf above the drawers for additional storage. The right side of the desk is supported by a sleek, angular metal leg, giving it a contemporary look and providing ample legroom. On the desktop, there is a small, angled picture frame or display stand, adding a personal touch. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of wood and metal materials. The desk's clean lines and functional storage make it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A modern wooden desk with three drawers, a metal leg, and a small display frame on top. It features a dark wood finish and a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the three drawers, open shelf, and the metal leg on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the desk's length, thin profile, and the small display frame on top.
description_view_2: Rear-right view showing the solid wood panel on the right and the back of the display frame.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear of the drawers and the open shelf above them.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the drawers and open shelf, intended for access to storage and workspace; the metal leg is on the user's right.
